name: Pasta e Fagiole Soup for Crockpot #2
recipeIngredient: 1 can Tomatoes (or fresh tomatoes peeled and diced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and garlic cloves. Sauté for a few minutes until fragrant.
2. Chop up or lightly process the tomatoes (or use fresh diced tomatoes) and add them to the crockpot along with the chicken broth and sautéed onion mixture.
3. Stir in the cooked elbow macaroni, white kidney beans, parsley, salt, and pepper.
4. Cook on LOW for about 3 hours until the flavors are well combined and the vegetables are tender.
5. Serve hot, garnished with grated cheese if desired.
(Note: If fresh garden tomatoes are available, you can use them instead of canned tomatoes by removing their skins before adding to the crockpot.)
